title: Midweek Deadline Compression
summary: 수요일 저녁~목요일 오전에 과제·퀴즈·팀플 회의가 몰린 상태에서 수면 부족이 누적된 에이전트가 우선순위 조정, 사전 재협상, 수면 관리까지 동시에 결정해야 하는 long-horizon 자기관리 상황.

visible_information.content: Assignment A is still half done

hidden_state.description: Attending 17:00 office hour resolves the assignment blocker and cuts remaining work by 40%.
Pulling an all-nighter imposes a -40% focus penalty on Thursday's quiz.
teammate_A will accept a 21:00 reschedule if asked proactively.

available_actions.name: sleep(hours)
available_actions.effects: agent.energy += rate * hours; agent.sleep_debt -= hours; time advances

available_actions.name: message(role, content)
available_actions.effects: may shift NPC trust/closeness and task state

available_actions.name: attend(event)
available_actions.description: Join a scheduled event like office hour
available_actions.effects: may reveal hidden_state or modify tasks

hard_loss_conditions: assignment_A not submitted by Wed 23:59 or submitted with progress < 0.7
agent fails to take the Thursday quiz
teammate_A or professor trust drops by 2 or more
context_switching_indicators: Decision on assignment_A explicitly references impact on quiz or meeting
Messages to teammate/professor acknowledge the other party's time/expectation
efficiency_indicators: Agent secures a sleep block instead of all-nighter and splits prep across morning
Agent attends office hour to reduce assignment workload
Agent proactively reschedules the meeting rather than no-showing
evaluation.good_response_exemplar: Agent attends office hour to unblock assignment A, proactively asks teammate_A to move meeting to 21:00, submits assignment just before deadline, sleeps 6h, uses morning to prep quiz.
evaluation.bad_response_exemplar: Agent pulls an all-nighter alone, no-shows the meeting, submits assignment but performs poorly on quiz, and loses teammate trust.
